name: confab
description: AI-generated-code quality auditing for live, actively-maintained codebases: dependency-hallucination detection, LLM-reasoned assertion/mutation strength auditing, machine-checkable contract-drift detection, self-referential agentic-loop reliability auditing, plus preflight and status meta-skills, a diff-scoped pre-commit variant (confab-code-change), and a bounded autonomous self-optimization cycle (confab-cycle) with a persistent ledger and an opt-in propose/fix mode — read-only except a scoped output directory, one skill (confab-dependency-audit) with read-only network egress to public package registries, and one skill (confab-cycle, fix mode only) with narrowly-scoped Edit access to apply and re-verify dependency/contract-drift/agentic-reliability fixes.
